money.prompt: If you found this haul in a thrift store for half the price, would you be just as excited?
Does this cart feel like an investment in yourself, or a temporary fix?
If you had the cash equivalent of this cart in your hand right now, would you still trade it for these clothes?
Think of your most-loved piece. Does this haul even come close?

space.prompt: Can you picture exactly which hangers or drawer dividers are currently empty and waiting for this?
Is your closet a curated collection or just...crowded? Where does this addition fit in?
If you had to get rid of an equal number of items to make room for this cart, what would be the first to go?
Picture your next laundry day. Are you giving your future self a lot more work?

need.prompt: If you couldn't wear this for two weeks, would you still be excited for it to arrive?
If you couldn't post a photo in these, would they still be in your cart?
Does this haul solve a nothing-to-wear problem?
If this cart disappeared and you had to find every item again, would you bother?
